audit.hand_derived_expectations: see self-check battery in this script (real-trace latencies, turns, chain fire count, def-B flip)

observed_vs_idealized.note: what the real night actually delivered under its nominal failsafe-2h posture (the 04:0xZ wake did not sweep fm): idealized replay understates real latency - the binding failure was sweep fidelity, not cadence

determinism.note: no wall clock, no unseeded randomness, no network; seeds are committed constants

catch_definitions.defA: latency to the wake that reads the trigger (E4 -> 90 min)
catch_definitions.defB: latency to done-when evidence = wake + 31.4 min measured exec lag (E4 -> 121.4 min)

meta.constraint: p95 catch-latency <= 120 min, uncaught arrivals count as +inf
meta.lambda_derivation: 5 real arrivals (E1..E5; E5 timeless but real) / 732 min window = 0.41/h; alt 4/732 in S8
meta.percentile_method: nearest-rank on pooled latencies (all seeds pooled)

pins.trace_range: idea-engine control/status.md history fc0bab6..531b109 (13 exclusive-range commits; 14 versions incl. fc0bab6)

S2_chain_sweeps_true.note: counterfactual: primary uses chain_sweeps=False per the E2 live proof (seat awake on chain during 03:15-03:28Z arrivals, caught only at 06:0x)

excluded.E5: no recorded arrival time (labels.json G8) - rate-counted, not replayed

trace.webhook_visible_class: EMPTY on the real trace (labels.json G11)

empty|defA.note: no catches - standing cost/night: failsafe-2h=7, failsafe-1h=13, failsafe-30m=25, failsafe-2h+chain-15m=7, event-driven-only=0, hybrid(event+failsafe-2h)=7

empty|defB.note: no catches - standing cost/night: failsafe-2h=7, failsafe-1h=13, failsafe-30m=25, failsafe-2h+chain-15m=7, event-driven-only=0, hybrid(event+failsafe-2h)=7
